app.title: Wiki Builder: Skill to Build LLM Knowledge Bases
app.author: omarsar
app.description: Skill to Build LLM Knowledge Bases
proposed_tests: Train a small model with Wiki Builder and measure accuracy
Compare Wiki Builder's performance with other similar tools
Test Wiki Builder's ability to handle complex queries
